name: my-skills
description: A grab-bag marketplace of Claude Code plugins for personal coding standards and workflows. Includes rest-api-design (designing, auditing, and evolving RESTful APIs following an adapted version of the Zalando REST API Guidelines) and go-ddd (building and auditing Domain-Driven Go backend services following an adapted version of the sklinkert/go-ddd patterns).

plugins.name: rest-api-design
plugins.description: Design, audit, and extend RESTful APIs: named operations (/audit, /add-collection, /add-resource, /new-version) plus builders for schema changes, deprecation, and compliance fixes, and knowledge skills covering API-first/OpenAPI, naming, URLs, JSON, HTTP methods, pagination, errors, compatibility, security, headers, async operations, performance, and event design.

plugins.name: go-ddd
plugins.description: Build and audit Domain-Driven Go backend services: a named operation (/audit) plus builders (add-aggregate, add-value-object, add-command, add-query, add-domain-event, add-repository-method, add-migration, modify-schema) that wire changes across all four layers, and knowledge skills covering the onion architecture, entities, value objects, aggregates, repositories, CQRS, the transactional outbox, idempotency, testing, and conventions. Adapted from sklinkert/go-ddd.
